requirement_topic.en: Fire-Safety and Electrical Safety Review for Nigerian BESS Installations
requirement_topic.zh: 尼日利亚BESS安装的消防与电气安全审查
requirement_topic.zht: 奈及利亞BESS安裝的消防與電氣安全審查

summary.en: Nigeria-side BESS installation review should address electrical safety, fire risk, emergency response, site access, ventilation, separation, thermal-runaway mitigation, signage, and commissioning controls. NERC's current code list includes a Health & Safety Code for the Nigerian Electricity Supply Industry, and project approval may also involve local fire authorities, NEMSA inspection, insurers, utilities, and the project owner. Product-level SONCAP evidence should not be treated as a complete installation fire-safety approval.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚侧BESS安装审查应覆盖电气安全、火灾风险、应急响应、场址通道、通风、间距、热失控缓解、标识和调试控制。NERC现行规范列表包括尼日利亚电力供应行业健康与安全规范，项目批准还可能涉及地方消防主管机关、NEMSA检查、保险方、公用事业单位和项目业主。产品级SONCAP证据不应被视为完整安装消防安全批准。
summary.zht: 奈及利亞側BESS安裝審查應覆蓋電氣安全、火災風險、應急響應、場址通道、通風、間距、熱失控緩解、標識和調試控制。NERC現行規範列表包括奈及利亞電力供應行業健康與安全規範，項目批准還可能涉及地方消防主管機關、NEMSA檢查、保險方、公用事業單位和項目業主。產品級SONCAP證據不應被視為完整安裝消防安全批准。

standards_or_laws: NERC Health & Safety Code for the Nigerian Electricity Supply Industry, Second Edition (March 2026)
Local fire-authority and project-owner fire-safety review where applicable
NEMSA or electrical installation safety inspection where applicable

summary.en: China GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558-2023 can support fire and operational due diligence, but Nigerian reviewers may still require local installation drawings, emergency procedures, inspection records, and authority-specific approval evidence.
summary.zh: 中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023可支持消防和运行尽调，但尼日利亚审查方仍可能要求本地安装图、应急程序、检查记录和主管机关特定批准证据。
summary.zht: 中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023可支持消防和運行盡調，但奈及利亞審查方仍可能要求本地安裝圖、應急程序、檢查記錄和主管機關特定批准證據。

gap.en: Prepare a site fire-safety file separate from product certification: layout, separation distances, HVAC or ventilation, gas detection where relevant, fire detection and suppression strategy, emergency shutdown logic, thermal-runaway evidence, commissioning test records, and English emergency procedures for the Nigerian site team and responders.
gap.zh: 应准备独立于产品认证的场址消防安全文件：布置图、间距、HVAC或通风、适用时的气体探测、火灾探测及灭火策略、紧急停机逻辑、热失控证据、调试测试记录，以及供尼日利亚现场团队和应急人员使用的英文应急程序。
gap.zht: 應準備獨立於產品認證的場址消防安全文件：佈置圖、間距、HVAC或通風、適用時的氣體探測、火災探測及滅火策略、緊急停機邏輯、熱失控證據、調試測試記錄，以及供奈及利亞現場團隊和應急人員使用的英文應急程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where NERC code, NEMSA inspection, local fire-authority review, insurer, utility, project owner, or site permit requires it; not proven as a blanket whole-unit import certification requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, GB 44240-2024 scope, and local fire review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SONCAP is not a substitute for Nigerian BESS installation fire-safety and electrical-safety review. Project teams should build a site-specific safety package before shipment and commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SONCAP不能替代尼日利亚BESS安装消防安全和电气安全审查。项目团队应在出货和调试前建立场址特定安全资料包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SONCAP不能替代奈及利亞BESS安裝消防安全和電氣安全審查。項目團隊應在出貨和調試前建立場址特定安全資料包。
